CVE-2024-37015.title: An issue was discovered in Ada Web Server 20.0. When configured t ...
CVE-2024-37015.summary: An issue was discovered in Ada Web Server 20.0. When configured to use SSL (which is not the default setting), the SSL/TLS used to establish connections to external services is done without proper hostname validation. This is exploitable by man-in-the-middle attackers.

CVE-2024-55581.title: When AdaCore Ada Web Server 25.0.0 is linked with GnuTLS, the def ...
CVE-2024-55581.summary: When AdaCore Ada Web Server 25.0.0 is linked with GnuTLS, the default behaviour of AWS.Client is vulnerable to a man-in-the-middle attack because of lack of verification of an HTTPS server's certificate (unless the using program specifies a TLS configuration).
